title: Learn to Preserve
description: Spend an afternoon with Big Sexy himself and learn how to put up jars like a pro. This isn't a lecture — you'll get your hands dirty. We'll break down the science behind a perfect brine, talk spice blending, and walk through every step from raw produce to sealed jar. You'll leave with real skills, real jars, and the confidence to start preserving on your own.
whatYouLearn: The fundamentals of safe food preservation — no guesswork
How to nail your brine ratios every single time
Proper sterilization so your jars stay shelf-stable
Spice blending and building flavor profiles that pop
Hot water bath canning from start to finish
Fermentation basics — the good kind of funky
Labeling, storage, and how to make your jars last
whatYouGet: 4 hours of real, hands-on instruction — not a demo
All materials and ingredients provided (just show up)
3 jars of your own creations to take home
A printed recipe booklet to keep the brining going
10% off your first Big Sexy's product order
